info.name: Gantt Chart
info.description:
A Gantt chart application for Nextcloud that allows you to create and manage projects with visual timeline views.
## Features - Create multiple projects - Add tasks with start/end dates, progress, and dependencies - Visual Gantt chart timeline view - Drag and resize tasks - Task dependencies (finish-to-start) - Color-coded task groups - Export capabilities
info.author: momijiina
